content.text:
*longer pause than the previous ones*

Surprised. Hm.

*looks slightly to the side*

I mean... we know each other pretty well at this point. Three years, living together. So there's not going to be a lot of — I don't think surprise is necessarily the metric. Some relationships are exciting because they're unstable, right? That's not the same as good.

*refocuses*

We had a nice dinner last week. We tried a new restaurant. That was... that was good.
